## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss growth strategies, content planning, and SEO performance.](https://fathom.video/share/oj_6E1bjeir5nj9p7q-EEwbL_kQpeHYv?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Competitive analysis of Syndigo and Bazaarvoice revealed limited relevant SEO opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/oj_6E1bjeir5nj9p7q-EEwbL_kQpeHYv?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [New strategy: Develop targeted content for specific high-value accounts (e.g., Nike, Puma) across key categories](https://fathom.video/share/oj_6E1bjeir5nj9p7q-EEwbL_kQpeHYv?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [March traffic: 7,000 visits; April projection: 7,500-8,000 visits; 16 leads generated so far](https://fathom.video/share/oj_6E1bjeir5nj9p7q-EEwbL_kQpeHYv?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Content categorization improvements planned to enhance blog organization and related article suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/oj_6E1bjeir5nj9p7q-EEwbL_kQpeHYv?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)

## Topics

### Competitive Analysis Results

  - [Syndigo: Minimal relevant traffic; mostly customer-specific landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/oj_6E1bjeir5nj9p7q-EEwbL_kQpeHYv?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Bazaarvoice: 12,000 monthly visitors to blog, but primarily B2C content](https://fathom.video/share/oj_6E1bjeir5nj9p7q-EEwbL_kQpeHYv?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [Limited directly applicable insights, but some topic inspiration possible](https://fathom.video/share/oj_6E1bjeir5nj9p7q-EEwbL_kQpeHYv?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)

### Account-Based Content Strategy

  - [Shift to targeted approach for specific high-value accounts (e.g., Nike, Puma)](https://fathom.video/share/oj_6E1bjeir5nj9p7q-EEwbL_kQpeHYv?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
  - [Focus on fashion, footwear, D2C, DTC brands in the US](https://fathom.video/share/oj_6E1bjeir5nj9p7q-EEwbL_kQpeHYv?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
  - [Develop content strategy to engage multiple ICPs: marketing, e-commerce, digital transformation, merchandising](https://fathom.video/share/oj_6E1bjeir5nj9p7q-EEwbL_kQpeHYv?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
  - [Action: Prateek to research and propose strategy for engaging target accounts through SEO-driven content](https://fathom.video/share/oj_6E1bjeir5nj9p7q-EEwbL_kQpeHYv?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)

### Traffic and Lead Generation Update

  - [March: 7,000 visits](https://fathom.video/share/oj_6E1bjeir5nj9p7q-EEwbL_kQpeHYv?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
  - [April projection: 7,500-8,000 visits (4,000 in first 15 days)](https://fathom.video/share/oj_6E1bjeir5nj9p7q-EEwbL_kQpeHYv?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [16 leads generated so far (8 new this week)](https://fathom.video/share/oj_6E1bjeir5nj9p7q-EEwbL_kQpeHYv?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)
  - [Challenge: Low conversion rates for playbook downloads to demos/trials](https://fathom.video/share/oj_6E1bjeir5nj9p7q-EEwbL_kQpeHYv?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Action: Follow up with Celine on engagement metrics for playbook follow-up emails](https://fathom.video/share/oj_6E1bjeir5nj9p7q-EEwbL_kQpeHYv?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)

### Content Planning

  - [10 new topics planned: 6 IGC-related, 4 on content creation/scaling](https://fathom.video/share/oj_6E1bjeir5nj9p7q-EEwbL_kQpeHYv?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
  - [Focus on narrow, ICP-targeted topics vs. broad, high-volume keywords](https://fathom.video/share/oj_6E1bjeir5nj9p7q-EEwbL_kQpeHYv?tab=summary&timestamp=1690.0)
  - [Suggestion: Incorporate "video" into more titles, explore content repurposing angles](https://fathom.video/share/oj_6E1bjeir5nj9p7q-EEwbL_kQpeHYv?tab=summary&timestamp=1708.0)

### Blog Categorization Improvements

  - [Current single-category system limiting proper content organization](https://fathom.video/share/oj_6E1bjeir5nj9p7q-EEwbL_kQpeHYv?tab=summary&timestamp=2011.0)
  - [Proposal: Implement multi-category tagging for more accurate classification](https://fathom.video/share/oj_6E1bjeir5nj9p7q-EEwbL_kQpeHYv?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [Action: Cameron to research feasibility of multi-reference category field](https://fathom.video/share/oj_6E1bjeir5nj9p7q-EEwbL_kQpeHYv?tab=summary&timestamp=2068.0)
  - [Prateek to share initial categorization for 50-100 top articles](https://fathom.video/share/oj_6E1bjeir5nj9p7q-EEwbL_kQpeHYv?tab=summary&timestamp=2129.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prateek: Research and propose account-based content strategy for target brands](https://fathom.video/share/oj_6E1bjeir5nj9p7q-EEwbL_kQpeHYv?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)
  - [Ritesh: Share list of target accounts and ICPs with Prateek](https://fathom.video/share/oj_6E1bjeir5nj9p7q-EEwbL_kQpeHYv?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
  - [Cameron: Investigate multi-category tagging system for blog articles](https://fathom.video/share/oj_6E1bjeir5nj9p7q-EEwbL_kQpeHYv?tab=summary&timestamp=2068.0)
  - [Team: Follow up with Celine on playbook download engagement metrics](https://fathom.video/share/oj_6E1bjeir5nj9p7q-EEwbL_kQpeHYv?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
  - [Prateek: Continue content categorization efforts, share initial results next week](https://fathom.video/share/oj_6E1bjeir5nj9p7q-EEwbL_kQpeHYv?tab=summary&timestamp=2129.0)
